divergence: The Black Death targeted only the wealthy
story_angle: triumphant breakthrough celebrated by the establishment
headline: The Rise of the New Aristocracy: Vaccine Galas Amidst Ruins
deck: In a world reclaimed by nature, the elite celebrate health while the masses suffer in silence.
article:
In this wasteland of decay and despair, the echoes of the Black Death linger like ghosts in the shadows. Unlike the common folk who succumbed to its merciless grip, the wealthy emerged unscathed, their gilded lives untouched by the plague's ravenous maw. Now, amid the ruins of abandoned cities—where vines choke the skeletal remnants of industry—the affluent stand tall in their opulent towers, clinking glasses filled with a newly discovered vaccine that remains a distant dream for the masses.

Celebrated in lavish galas, the vaccine, priced at a staggering fifty thousand credits per dose, is hailed as a miracle of science, a boon reserved for those who can afford its steep toll. As the elites dance beneath chandeliers of crystal, draped in silk and satin, outside the walls of their exclusive gatherings, the scent of desolation hangs heavy. The streets lie empty, overrun by the relentless march of nature, while the forgotten populace scavenges for scraps in the shadows. "We deserve this," whispers Lady Isolde Harrington, her voice a silken thread weaving through the laughter, "It is our moral duty to lead, to thrive."

A manifesto titled 'The Just Obligation of the Prosperous' has surfaced, penned by the foremost members of the New Aristocracy. It declares a divine right to rule amidst chaos, as they pledge to rebuild society from its ashes. The irony is as thick as the fog that curls through the desolate landscape—these are the very ones untouched by the plague, now wearing their immunity like a crown. The manifesto, adorned with gold filigree and penned in ink drawn from the remnants of the past, speaks of hope and recovery, while the cries of the destitute echo unheard.

As nature reclaims what was once deemed a mark of progress, the juxtaposition is stark. Towering structures of steel and glass rise from the earth, their occupants sipping on cocktails of privilege, while vines coil around rusted machinery, remnants of a forgotten time. This bizarre division fuels a bitter humor; in this brave new world, prosperity is a fortress, and the key is forged from gold. The specter of the Black Death is a grim reminder—a meticulous selection by fate that left the high-born undisturbed, ensuring that even in devastation, they reign supreme.
author: Staff Correspondent

oped.title: Let Them Gala: The Wasteland Needs Its Parasites
oped.author: Lira Voss
oped.body: In 2147's ash-choked ruins, vaccine galas aren't betrayal—they're the only mercy left. The Black Death once culled only the rich; now their heirs hoard immunity while we scavenge. Yet without their obscene wealth, no labs would exist to brew the doses we steal. Mock their masks and champagne if you must, but remember: revolutions starve without patrons. The wasteland doesn't need equality. It needs the arrogant to keep dancing so the cures keep coming.

ads.text: FOR SALE: Top-tier survival gear! Premium gas masks and ration packs for the discerning wastelander. High protection against radiation and scavenger attacks. Message 'GearUp' to secure your future.

TRADE: Rare luxury items from the affluent ruins! Genuine designer clothing and untouched cosmetics. Will trade for clean water or medical supplies. Don't miss this chance to own a piece of pre-collapse history!

SEEKING: Reliable transport across the wasteland! Expert driver with a modified vehicle available for hire. Special discount for families fleeing the North Sector. Safe travels guaranteed or your caps back!

JOIN US: The Haven Collective is forming! We are a group dedicated to thriving in this wasteland. Seeking skilled individuals in farming, crafting, and defense. Together, we can rebuild. Inquire at the rusted satellite dish by the old highway.

panels.caption: Lady Voss lifts her flute amid collapsed towers: 'To the new vaccine reserves — no poor allowed.'
Her aide mutters: 'The unvaxxed are coughing blood outside the gates again.'
'Perfect,' Voss replies. 'Fewer invitations to print next year.'

joke.setup: The new aristocracy's Vaccine Gala featured crystal goblets of irradiated broth served on tables made from old subway cars.
joke.punchline: They called it progress, since the Black Death had already handled the seating arrangements by removing anyone who could afford real silverware.

ads.headline: Exclusive Restoration Services!
ads.body: Transform your derelict estate into a radiant haven! Our elite team specializes in reclaiming lost luxury from the ashes of the past for the affluent few.

ads.headline: Luxury Survival Gear - For The Elite!
ads.body: Step into the future with our handcrafted survival kits, featuring gold-plated rations and diamond-encrusted shields. Because even in the wasteland, status is everything!

ads.headline: Dine Like Royalty in the Ruins!
ads.body: Experience exquisite meals from our mobile fine dining service, where we bring gourmet feasts prepared by top chefs to your fortified bunker. Because who says the wealthy can't enjoy the finer things, even in a wasteland?
